observations: Langfuse trace exists at http://localhost:3001 with name 'triage.incident', tags ['incidentId:<id>', 'tenantId:<id>'], sessionId=incidentId, userId=tenantId
Generation span 'llm.complete' is nested under 'triage.incident' span (parentObservationId linked) via AsyncLocalStorage
Prompt (systemPrompt + userPrompt) recorded as generation input
Completion/triage summary recorded as span output

Token counts and cost show 0/null because ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not configured (LLM falls back); code correctly calls setUsage()/metrics.histogram() when LLM succeeds per ObservedAnthropicClient unit test

Full end-to-end verification requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY + LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY; with all configured the triage call creates a Langfuse generation with actual prompt/completion/tokens/cost
